title: hieracium strumosum
intro: Hieracium strumosum, also known as the sticky hawk's beard or rough hawk's beard, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting skin health. Hieracium strumosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
